name: Termbray Industries International (Holdings) Limited
summary: Termbray Industries International (Holdings) Limited, an investment holding company, invests in, develops, and sells real estate properties in the People's Republic of China. The company's portfolio of properties includes residential units, commercial arcades, and car parks. It also engages in the money lending business. The company was incorporated in 1990 and is headquartered in Tsuen Wan, Hong Kong.
